overall.description: A third-person perspective follows a samurai character wearing a straw cloak and wide hat walking through a misty mountain meadow in a video game. The character traverses from a grassy field into a white flower meadow with a distant waterfall and snow-capped mountains visible through overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy meadow at forest edge with mountain views

events.description: white wildflowers begin appearing in the grass as the character advances

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the grassy meadow toward the distant snow-capped mountains

entered.detail: dense evergreen pine trees forming the left boundary of the meadow
dense evergreen pine trees forming the right boundary of the meadow
misty mountain range with snow-covered peaks visible in the distance
open field of green grass with scattered wildflowers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a samurai character walking through a wide grassy meadow. Pine forests line both sides of the field while snow-capped mountains rise in the misty distance. The overcast sky creates a cool, diffused light across the landscape as the character moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: white flower meadow with waterfall vista

events.description: waterfall becomes visible on the right side of the frame, cascading down the mountain

agents.ego_description: continuing through the meadow as white flowers become prominent in the foreground

entered.detail: dense patches of white wildflowers covering the ground in the foreground
tall waterfall cascading down the rocky mountainside in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character enters a section of the meadow dominated by white wildflowers covering the ground. As the camera advances, a waterfall becomes visible on the right side, cascading down the distant mountain face. The right-side forest recedes from view, opening up the vista toward the rocky cliffs and falling water.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain approach with waterfall and rocky cliffs

agents.ego_description: approaching the base of the mountain where the waterfall descends

entered.detail: large moss-covered rock formation and cliff base on the right side

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the character approaches closer to the mountain base, with a large rocky cliff face now dominating the right side of the frame. The waterfall appears closer and more prominent against the mountain slope. The white flowers continue to line the path as the misty valley opens up ahead, framed by the snow-capped peaks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty mountain meadow that gradually opens into a dramatic vista of white wildflowers and cascading water. It begins by following a samurai walking through a wide grassy field flanked by pine forests under a cool, overcast sky. As the character advances, the grass shifts into a dense carpet of white wildflowers and the forest on the right recedes, revealing a distant waterfall tumbling down a mountain face. The scene then expands as the camera approaches the base of the mountain, where a massive rocky cliff dominates the right side of the frame and the waterfall becomes more prominent. Finally, the path continues through the blossoms as the misty valley opens up toward the towering snow-capped peaks.
